name: intervals-icu
description: Intervals.icu source semantics and API access for training activity, stream, and wellness data.

interface.shortDescription: Fetch and interpret Intervals.icu activities, intervals, wellness, and files.
interface.longDescription: Intervals.icu provides source-specific guidance and CLI access for activity metadata, interval summaries, wellness fields, subjective fields, file downloads, and cautious Intervals.icu writes. Plotting, readiness composition, and cross-source training analysis live in the training-ai layer.
defaultPrompt: Help me save RPE to Intervals.icu.
